channel.title: socialmedia on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in socialmedia on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: Social Tokens: Who, What & Why? S2Ep19
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today Allen & Unkle Bonehead discus Social Tokens. What they are, who they are for, how to create them & why someone would want one.

item.title: Riding the Waves on Ecency's Decks 2.0! S2Ep17
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Ecency released a major update earlier this week and it’s probably the best they’ve ever done.

item.title: What is the form of a perfect internet? S2Ep13
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today’s episode was spurred, as usual, by the Cryptocracy newsletter. One of the stories Allen reported on was about what is the perfect internet? So that’s what Allen & I riffed about.

item.title: User Generated Content S2Ep11
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This is a solo episode from Allen. He gives you a free chapter of his newest book talking about User Generated Content.

item.title: Hanging with PVM S2Ep08
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we got to hang out with PVM. An awesome Web3 personality with NFT’s for charities and written content to an audience in the thousands.

item.title: How to Fix Stephen Crowder's Problem S2Ep03
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In a bombshell of an episode of Louder with Crowder Steven literally nuked big Conservative media…

item.title: 10 Thing's Allen Likes About Read dot Cast S1Ep13
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode Unkle Bonehead is still out with no microphone so Allen is flying solo again.

item.title: PublishOx S1Ep12
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode Allen is flying solo.

item.title: When FTX fails Decentralization Wins. S1E09
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: We talk about the recent blowup of FTX and why it could be a good thing for Cryptosocial.

item.title: Twitter Migration: Rise of the Fediverse S1Ep08
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In case you’ve been living under a rock. Elon Musk completed the deal and now owns Twitter.

item.title: Web3 Identity Crisis: Pt1 S1E05
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: There is so much to unpack in this article that this is going to end up being a series.

item.title: Platform Review: hive S1Ep04
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we do our first platform review and it is what we consider to be the best Cryptosocial platform currently available.

item.title: What is Decentralization & Why is it needed? S1Ep03
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode Allan and I talk about what decentralization means to us. What we think it should be and how it empowers the individual.

item.title: Why Cryptosocial Networks are Needed S1Ep02
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode we are going to go over the criteria and expectations that we think should be included in a Cryptosocial media platform. What we think you should look for in a social media home.
